name: im-not-ai-codex
description: Codex plugin port of Humanize KR, a Korean AI-tell detection and style rewriting workflow version-synced with epoko77-ai/im-not-ai v2.0.0.

interface.shortDescription: Korean AI-tell detection with v2.0 post-editese metrics
interface.longDescription: Use Humanize Korean to detect Korean AI-writing tells, rewrite only the affected style spans, and audit that meaning, numbers, names, and quotations remain intact. This community Codex plugin port follows epoko77-ai/im-not-ai v2.0.0, including the Korean translation-studies taxonomy, post-editese metrics layer, monolith fast path, and strict role workflow.
defaultPrompt: humanize-korean으로 이 글 AI 티 없애줘:
Use Humanize Korean to rewrite this Korean draft without changing meaning.
